intro: A curated set of 5 Stack problems frequently useful for Meta interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Stack problems should I do for Meta?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 5 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Stack topic page and related roadmaps.

seo.title: Best Stack Questions for Meta | AlgoForge
seo.description: Top Stack coding interview questions for Meta. Practice list, FAQs, and pattern links.
